scripts.build: command -v mud >/dev/null 2>&1 && mud build || echo 'MUD CLI not installed, skipping build (install with: pnpm add -g @latticexyz/cli)'
scripts.clean: command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1 && forge clean && rm -rf src/codegen || echo 'Forge not installed, skipping clean'
scripts.test: if [ -n "$(find test -name '*.t.sol' -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ]; then PRIVATE_KEY=${PRIVATE_KEY:-0xac0974bec39a17e36ba4a6b4d238ff944bacb478cbed5efcae784d7bf4f2ff80} bunx mud test; else echo 'No contract tests defined (test/**/*.t.sol not found); skipping mud test'; fi
